description_long: This is a spacious residential property enclosed by a perimeter wall, featuring multiple buildings and outdoor amenities. The main house is a two-story structure with a gable roof, complemented by several single-story outbuildings, including a garage and a pool house. The property includes a central courtyard with a swimming pool, a wooden deck, and landscaped areas with trees and shrubs. There is a large paved driveway and parking area, as well as a separate utility shed at the rear. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large glass doors opening onto patios. The main entryway is marked by a covered porch with steps and a small overhang.
description: A large, modern house complex with multiple buildings, a pool, deck, and landscaped yard, all enclosed by a perimeter wall. The main house features a gable roof and a covered entry porch.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front of the property with the main house, garage, and entry gate, highlighting the paved driveway and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: View 1 reveals the backyard with the pool, wooden deck, and outbuildings, as well as the open recreational area and trees.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a clear look at the central courtyard, pool, and the arrangement of the main and secondary buildings around the yard.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the side of the property, showing the garage, driveway, and the relationship between the main house and outbuildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with some large glass doors and regular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, small overhang, and a prominent main door
